subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Creator of heaven unto them that have turned towards Him and believed in Him and in His signs, on a Day wherein mankind have turned away, save whom God willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله فاطر السماء لمن اقبل الیه و آمن به و بایاته فی یوم فیه اعرض الناس الا من شاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @eulogies; reminiscences, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
